title: python: declare aiocoap OSCORE filelock dependency
description: Why this exists: while validating project-LICHEN-1ox2, importing lichen.crypto.oscore through aiocoap.oscore failed in a fresh project venv with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'filelock'. Installing python[dev] did not provide filelock even though aiocoap.oscore imports it during normal package import. What needs to be done: decide whether filelock should be declared as a direct Python dependency or the crypto import path should avoid importing aiocoap.oscore unless OSCORE is used, then update dependency metadata/tests accordingly.
